sections.title: Projects
sections.body: A collection of systems focused on automation, monitoring, and scalable infrastructure.

items.title: PI-Panic
description: A system designed to monitor states across multiple devices and trigger alerts based on severity and priority.
Focused on real-time communication, escalation logic, and flexible UI display systems.
about: A distributed alert and monitoring system for networked devices.

items.title: PI-Updater
description: A system designed to manage updates across remote or distributed devices.
Focuses on simplifying deployment, syncing versions, and maintaining consistency.
about: A system for automating updates and syncing remote devices.
